title: AI-Powered DDoS: Attack and Defense
modules: Module 1: How AI Is Rewriting the DDoS Playbook — Scale, Adaptation, and Automation
Module 2: Anatomy of an AI-Driven DDoS — Botnets, Amplification, and Adaptive Traffic Shaping
Module 3: Detection Under Fire — Using ML to Identify Intelligent Attack Patterns in Real Time
Module 4: Defense Architectures — Rate Limiting, Traffic Scrubbing, and AI-Assisted Mitigation Tools
Module 5: Case Studies — Mirai Variants, Application-Layer Attacks, and What Failed
Module 6: Incident Response Playbooks for AI-Augmented DDoS Events
Module 7: Red Team Exercises — Simulating Adaptive DDoS and Stress-Testing Your Defenses
synopsis: When an AI-orchestrated botnet can probe your defenses, adapt its traffic signature in seconds, and saturate your infrastructure before analysts can respond, traditional rate-limiting rules become dangerously inadequate. This course equips security professionals with the technical depth to detect adaptive DDoS campaigns, evaluate modern mitigation tooling, and build resilient incident response workflows before the next attack finds the gaps.
rationale: AI is enabling DDoS attacks that dynamically evade signature-based defenses at a scale and speed that renders legacy mitigation strategies obsolete, yet most training curricula still treat DDoS as a static volumetric problem.
learning_outcome: Learners will be able to distinguish AI-adaptive DDoS traffic from legitimate spikes, select appropriate mitigation controls for application-layer and volumetric variants, and execute a structured incident response playbook under live attack conditions.
source_signals: Demo: Using AI/ML & Global Threat Intelligence to Stop DDoS Attacks in Real-Time
